message:
fix(abi): make fgetspent_r and fgetpwent_r skip comments and malformed lines instead of failing on first non-match

- Wrap the single-line read in fgetspent_r in a loop that skips empty
  lines, comment lines (starting with '#'), and lines with fewer than
  8 colon-separated fields, continuing to the next line instead of
  returning ENOENT — this matches glibc behavior where the reentrant
  shadow/passwd file readers iterate past comments and malformed entries
- Apply the same looping pattern to fgetpwent_r for consistency
- Update ABI tests to cover the new comment/malformed-line skipping

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
